notes: This is the first popularity source for MCP ingestion.
This snapshot contains the visible MCP plugin list from the page scrape on 2026-04-19.
Only fields useful for our ingestion flow are stored here.

entries.name: GitHub
entries.description: Integration with GitHub issues through MCP.

entries.description: PostgREST-backed Supabase MCP server for Postgres queries and operations.

entries.description: Vercel infrastructure integration for AI model tasks.

entries.description: Interact with the Stripe API.
